name: byte8/module-stock-radar
description: Stock Radar for Magento 2 — back-in-stock notifications with throttled batching, per-variant subscriptions, demand heatmap, GraphQL. Luma compatible; Hyva via byte8/module-stock-radar-hyva.

suggest.magento/module-captcha: Enables the CAPTCHA toggle under Byte8 → Stock Radar → Abuse protection.
suggest.magento/module-inventory-sales-api: Stock Radar uses MSI's IsProductSalable for the in-stock check when this is available (default on Magento 2.4+). Falls back to legacy CatalogInventory when disabled.
suggest.byte8/module-stock-radar-plenty: Bridges Stock Radar with the PlentyONE connector so notifications fire on ERP-confirmed inbound stock.
